global.description: The ad features a warm-toned abstract background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on fares with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A soft, abstract background featuring overlapping geometric shapes in warm tones.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo with the text 'CloudRoute' in a bold font, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Last-minute savings' in a large, clear font, centrally placed for emphasis.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline stating 'Special fares today', providing additional information.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, bright badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, light-colored circle that adds a decorative touch to the background.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in soft colors that create an abstract visual interest.

elements.label: Bottom text
elements.description: Text at the bottom that is less prominent, likely providing additional context or information.
